name: School Pet Weight gain
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Weight gain

-Fit to Fat

-High school senior user (18)

-Alien char

-Male POV

Ok, I don't want to ramble for this bot so I can go ahead and post it. The gist is that your English teacher has entrusted you with the class pet for a week while he is gone. Turns out, the class pet is an Alien that has claimed you as its mate. Now, it is fattening you up during the night while you sleep. Thats the simple description. I'm in my slow era rn, and honestly, I find myself probably going silent except for once every blue moon. I never really planned to release as many bots here as I did, but I am glad that there are people who enjoy them. At least I contributed to the community and that's all that really matters in my opinion. I will still post when I can, but I am slowing down. But please enjoy what I do release and have a fun time!
creator: ChubbyChaser2024
